'''鈭歞h-s-y-j''' ('''kadhasyejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:velcome|velcome]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-y-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:velcome|velcome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-s-y-j
|-
! Lemma
| kadhasyejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhasyejoko|thidhasyejoko]] || [[word:jidhasyejoko|jidhasyejoko]] || [[word:shidhasyejoko|shidhasyejoko]] || [[word:kidhasyejoko|kidhasyejoko]]

|-
